default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new talent team members to GrowthX's hiring process and tools, focusing on the AI-assisted candidate screening system.](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses a custom AI-powered system integrated with Workable ATS to efficiently screen high volumes of applicants](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [The system generates job expectations, interview questions, and candidate assessments based on job descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [New talent team members (Marília and Tucker) are getting onboarded and will have input on optimizing the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [The team is open to exploring other ATS options like Greenhouse for future scaling](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

## Topics

### Current Hiring Process Overview

  - [Uses Workable ATS integrated with custom AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Job postings generate expectations documents and interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [AI screens resumes and application answers, ranking candidates](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Video interviews conducted through Hirevue for transcript analysis](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [High application volume (e.g., 700+ for content writer role) necessitates AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### AI-Assisted Screening System

  - [Generates job expectations from descriptions (e.g., qualifications, skills)](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Creates evaluation rubrics for resume analysis and interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
